options.name: <blackBoxCellName>
options.description: name of the blackbox or blackblob cell

options.name: -assertion_type
options.description: Specifies one of the following assertion types

options.name: -falling
options.description: Specifies that timing arcs should be deleted for falling clock transitions

options.name: -from
options.description: Specifies all arcs starting from the port

options.name: -port
options.description: Specifies the name of one or more ports

options.name: -rising
options.description: Specifies that timing arcs should be deleted for rising clock transitions

options.name: -to
options.description: Specifies all arcs ending at the port
